title: RuneContextApprovedImplementationInputSet
description: Typed approved implementation input-set contract for fail-closed binding and drift checks in the built-in RuneContext implementation workflow.

input_set_digest.description: Canonical digest identity of the whole approved implementation input-set payload.

approved_input_digests.description: Canonical digest identities for each approved upstream input included in this set.

workflow_definition_hash.description: Canonical digest identity of the reviewed workflow definition bound at approval time.

process_definition_hash.description: Canonical digest identity of the reviewed process definition bound at approval time.

approval_profile.description: Shared approval profile value bound into this approved input set.

autonomy_posture.description: Shared autonomy posture value bound into this approved input set.

validated_project_substrate_digest.description: Canonical digest identity of the validated project substrate context used to approve this set.

project_substrate_snapshot_digest.description: Canonical digest identity of the concrete project substrate snapshot used to approve this set.

control_input_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for control-plane input bindings that must remain stable for execution authority.

repo_identity_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for the authoritative repository identity binding.

repo_state_identity_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for repository state bound for fail-closed drift detection.
